tools.name: compare-car-insurance
tools.description:
Generates an interactive car insurance comparison widget for the Netherlands.
Required: `licenseplate` (Dutch license plate), `driverbirthdate` (format: YYYY-MM-DD), `driverzipcode` (format: 1234AB), `driverhousenumber`, and `claimfreeyears`.
Coverage options:
- WA: Basic third-party liability (default)
- WA + Beperkt Casco: Third-party + limited collision coverage
- WA + Volledig Casco: Full comprehensive coverage
Defaults: Coverage is WA, kilometrage is 10,000 km/year.
